metadata.title: Synaply - AI आणि स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशनसह शब्दसंग्रह शिका
metadata.description: AI-चालित स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशनसह तुमची भाषा कौशल्ये वाढवा. सानुकूल शब्द सूची तयार करा किंवा समुदायाने सामायिक केलेल्या सार्वजनिक सूचींमधून शिका.
metadata.keywords: इंग्रजी शिका, स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशन, शब्दसंग्रह बिल्डर, फ्लॅशकार्ड्स, AI भाषा शिक्षण, शब्द सूची, भाषा अभ्यास अॅप, स्पॅनिश शिका, फ्रेंच शिका, जर्मन शिका, भाषा प्राविण्य, शब्द लक्षात ठेवा, SRS शिक्षण
metadata.og_description: AI-चालित स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशनसह तुमची भाषा कौशल्ये वाढवा. वेगाने शिका, जास्त काळ लक्षात ठेवा.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI भाषा शिक्षण अॅप इंटरफेस
metadata.twitter_description: स्मार्ट स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशन आणि AI वापरून तुमचा शब्दसंग्रह वाढवण्यासाठी Synaply मध्ये सामील व्हा.

common.title: शीर्षक
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: डॅशबोर्ड
dashboard.subtitle: {source} मधून {target} शिकत आहात
dashboard.community_lists_desc: इतर वापरकर्त्यांकडील सार्वजनिक शब्द सूची आणि प्लेलिस्ट एक्सप्लोर करा.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: कोणत्याही विषयावर किंवा तुमच्या शब्द सूचीवर आधारित AI-व्युत्पन्न वाक्यांचे भाषांतर करून तुमचा शब्दसंग्रह सुधारा.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: तुमच्या संग्रहातील शब्द पहा, शोधा, संपादित करा किंवा हटवा.
dashboard.import_error_retry: आम्ही तुमचा नवीन शब्द जतन करू शकलो नाही. चला पुन्हा एकदा प्रयत्न करूया!
dashboard.select_topic_error: कृपया एखादा विषय निवडा किंवा तुमचा स्वतःचा संदर्भ प्रविष्ट करा.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI व्याख्या आणि उदाहरण वाक्यासह मदत करेल
dashboard.delete_confirm: तुम्हाला खात्री आहे की तुम्ही हा शब्द हटवू इच्छिता?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: तुम्हाला खात्री आहे की तुम्ही तुमचे सर्व शब्द हटवू इच्छिता? ही क्रिया पूर्ववत केली जाऊ शकत नाही.
dashboard.no_words_found: शब्द सापडले नाहीत. वेगळा शोध शब्द वापरून पहा किंवा काही शब्द जोडा!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: अभ्यासासाठी कोणतेही शब्द सापडले नाहीत. कृपया प्रथम तुमच्या सूचीमध्ये नवीन शब्द जोडा!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: तुमच्याकडे आज पुनरावलोकनासाठी कोणतेही शब्द नाहीत. नंतर परत या किंवा नवीन शब्द जोडा!
dashboard.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Great job! You've reviewed your words for today.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Enter a topic to generate custom practice sentences just for you!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Leaving it empty will generate sentences based on your vocabulary.
dashboard.support_desc: If you like this app, you can support its development.

onboarding.journey_begins: Start building lasting neural connections today.
onboarding.strategy_desc: To get the most out of Synaply, we recommend this simple strategy:
onboarding.step1_desc: Add about 100 words related to a single topic (e.g., Business or Travel) to build strong context.
onboarding.step2_desc: Strengthen neural pathways through scientific repetition until words are hard-wired into your memory.
onboarding.step3_desc: Switch to AI Practice to use your new vocabulary in full sentences and real-world situations.

dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: e.g. Words for a business meeting about marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: Share this collection of {count} words with other users. It will be visible in the Public Lists gallery.
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Word "{word}" is already in the list
dashboard.inline_add_error: Please provide both original word and translation
dashboard.save_batch_success: Successfully saved {count} words to your list!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Failed to save words. Please try again.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: The AI is taking a quick coffee break. Please try again in a moment!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Oops! We couldn't get the AI insights. Let's try again!

public_lists.title: Public Word Lists
public_lists.subtitle: Explore word lists created by other users for your languages.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Search lists by title or description...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Try a different search or change your language filters.
public_lists.load_error: We couldn't load public lists right now.

detail.title: List Details
detail.added_success: Words successfully added to your collection!
detail.added_error: Failed to add words to your collection.
detail.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this public list? This action cannot be undone.
detail.duplicate_error: There are duplicate words in the list. Please remove them before saving.

onboarding.title: Synaply मध्ये आपले स्वागत आहे
onboarding.subtitle: तुमचा वैयक्तिक भाषा शिक्षण प्रवास इथून सुरू होतो.
onboarding.step1_desc: तुम्हाला कोणत्या भाषेतून शिकायचे आहे आणि तुम्हाला कोणती भाषा शिकायची आहे ते निवडा.
onboarding.step2_desc: तुम्ही स्वतः शब्द जोडू शकता किंवा आमच्या AI ला तुमच्या स्वारस्यांच्या आधारावर सूची व्युत्पन्न करण्यास सांगू शकता.
onboarding.step3_desc: आमचे स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशन अल्गोरिदम तुम्हाला शब्द विसरण्यापूर्वीच त्यांचे पुनरावलोकन करण्यास मदत करेल.

topics.title: अभ्यास विषय
topics.subtitle: तुमचा शब्दसंग्रह वाढवण्यासाठी नवीन विषय एक्सप्लोर करा
topics.select_topic_desc: तुमच्या आवडीचा विषय निवडा आणि आमचे AI शिकण्यासाठी शब्दांची सूची तयार करेल.

public_lists.title: सार्वजनिक शब्द सूची
public_lists.subtitle: इतर वापरकर्त्यांनी तयार केलेल्या संग्रहांमधून शिका

profile.title: प्रोफाइल
profile.delete_account_warning: ही क्रिया कायमस्वरूपी आहे आणि तुमचा सर्व डेटा हटवेल.
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.
profile.leave_empty: Leave empty to keep current password
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and language settings

login.title: लॉगिन करा
login.subtitle: पुन्हा स्वागत आहे! तुमचे शिक्षण सुरू ठेवा.

register.title: नोंदणी करा
register.subtitle: तुमचा शब्दसंग्रह वाढवण्यास आजच सुरुवात करा.

help.title: मदत केंद्र
help.about_desc: Synaply हे तुम्हाला नवीन शब्दसंग्रह कार्यक्षमतेने शिकण्यास आणि टिकवून ठेवण्यास मदत करण्यासाठी डिझाइन केलेले आहे.
help.sr_desc: आम्ही वैज्ञानिकरीत्या सिद्ध केलेले अल्गोरिदम वापरतो जे तुम्ही शब्द विसरण्याच्या अगदी आधी पुनरावलोकनांचे वेळापत्रक ठरवते, ज्यामुळे दीर्घकालीन टिकवून ठेवण्याची खात्री होते.
help.ai_desc: आमचे AI संदर्भ-विशिष्ट उदाहरणे, व्याख्या आणि वाक्य सराव प्रदान करते जे तुमच्या शिकण्याच्या पातळीशी जुळवून घेते.

best_practice.title: Best Practice for Success
best_practice.strategy_desc: For the most effective learning experience, we recommend this simple 3-step strategy:
best_practice.step1_desc: Add about 100 words focusing on a single topic (e.g., Travel or Business) to create context.
best_practice.step2_desc: Master these words through daily repetition until they become part of your vocabulary.
best_practice.step3_desc: Switch to AI Practice to use your new vocabulary in full sentences and real-world contexts.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.desc: Synaply is a powerful tool designed to help you expand your vocabulary and improve your language skills using spaced repetition and artificial intelligence.
getting_started.step1_desc: Add words manually or use AI to generate lists by topics and levels.
getting_started.step2_desc: Use Vocabulary Review to memorize words using the FSRS algorithm.

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.desc: Enter the word in the language you are learning and its translation. You can add a comment or context for better memorization.

auto_translate.title: Auto-translate
auto_translate.desc: Use the "Auto-translate" feature for instant translation via the DeepL service.

ai_list.title: List Generation (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Choose a level (A1-C2) and a topic, and AI (Gemini) will compile a list of relevant words for you, which can be added to your dictionary with one click.

ai_insights.title: AI Insights
ai_insights.desc: For each word, AI can provide synonyms, usage examples, and grammatical tips.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply uses the FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) algorithm to calculate the ideal time to repeat each word.
spaced_repetition.step1: You are shown a word in the source language.
spaced_repetition.step2: Enter the translation and press Enter or Check Answer.
spaced_repetition.step3: If you don't remember — click "Don't remember" to see the answer.
spaced_repetition.step4: The algorithm will recalculate the next review date based on your response.

ai_practice.title: AI Practice: Sentence Translation
ai_practice.desc: This feature helps train grammar and context by translating entire sentences composed by AI specifically for you.
ai_practice.step1: Select a topic (e.g., "Business", "Travel") or leave the field blank.
ai_practice.step2: AI will generate 5 sentences on the selected topic.
ai_practice.step3: Submit your translation and receive a detailed breakdown.
ai_practice.step4: AI will point out mistakes and suggest the ideal translation with explanations.

dictionary_management.title: Dictionary Management
dictionary_management.search: Search: Use the search bar to quickly find words in your collection.
dictionary_management.sorting: Sorting: View a list of all your words with the option to delete them.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Delete all words: Ability to completely clear your dictionary in one click.

progress.title: Progress and Points
progress.desc: Your score (in the app header) displays the number of correctly translated words. The higher the score, the more words you have successfully mastered!

spaced_repetition.title: स्पॅस्ड रिपीटिशन अल्गोरिदम
spaced_repetition.description: आमची प्रणाली तुमची प्रगती ट्रॅक करण्यासाठी आणि प्रत्येक शब्दासाठी इष्टतम पुनरावलोकन वेळ शोधण्यासाठी FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) अल्गोरिदमची सुधारित आवृत्ती वापरते.

stages.learning_desc: शब्द जे तुम्ही शिकण्याच्या सुरुवातीच्या टप्प्यात आहात.
stages.review_desc: तुमच्या दीर्घकालीन स्मृतीमध्ये शब्द एकत्रित करण्यासाठी पुनरावलोकन करणे आवश्यक आहे.
stages.relearning_desc: तुम्ही विसरलेले शब्द आणि पुन्हा शिकण्याची गरज आहे.

buttons.again_desc: विसरलात, पूर्णपणे चूक (१ मिनिटापेक्षा कमी वेळात पुन्हा पहा)
buttons.hard_desc: ठिकाणी आठवले किंवा काही चुकांसह (लवकरच पुन्हा पहा)
buttons.easy_desc: तात्काळ आणि सहजपणे आठवले (दीर्घ पुनरावलोकन मध्यांतर)

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
